## Checklist

- [ ] Data is anonymized (no PII, credentials, or org names)
- [ ] Entries reference at least one DSGAI ID where applicable
- [ ] Validation scripts pass (`python run_all_checks.py`)
- [ ] One entry per file for dataset contributions
